title: HideTAB
description: A Minecraft plugin for Spigot and Paper 1.21 to 1.21.8 that allows hiding and showing players from the tab list using commands. Players with permission can use /hidetab and /showtab to control visibility in the tab menu.
body:
⚡ HideTab Plugin for Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.8 (Spigot/Paper)
This plugin lets you control who appears in the TAB list 🎮

✨ Features:

Commands ➝ /hidetab <player> & /showtab <player>

Permission ➝ hidetab.use

Hidden players 🔒 won’t appear in TAB for others

Show them again anytime ✔️

Perfect for admins, streamers, or custom servers where you want to stay invisible. 👻

Made By Pixel Beast.
